title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Akshaya Private Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Akshaya Private Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
